entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The grain crop being studied for resistance to the sorghum midge

entities.name: SORGHUM MIDGE
entities.description: The pest Contarinia sorghicola that attacks grain sorghum

entities.name: HOST-PLANT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the sorghum plant to resist attack by the sorghum midge

entities.name: ANTIBIOSIS
entities.description: A mechanism of resistance where the host plant adversely affects the biology and development of the pest

entities.name: ADULT EMERGENCE
entities.description: The process and timing of the sorghum midge reaching the adult stage

entities.name: POSTEMBRYONIC DEVELOPMENTAL PERIOD
entities.description: The duration of development for the midge after the embryonic stage

entities.name: FECUNDITY
entities.description: The reproductive capacity of the sorghum midge, measured by the number of eggs

entities.name: LARVAL SURVIVAL
entities.description: The rate at which sorghum midge larvae survive

entities.name: TANNINS
entities.description: Chemical compounds in sorghum grains that contribute to antibiosis

entities.name: SOLUBLE SUGARS
entities.description: Chemical compounds in sorghum grains whose levels correlate with midge resistance

entities.name: PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: Chemical compounds in sorghum grains that contribute to antibiosis

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The environmental period during which midge resistance was studied

entities.name: POST-RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The environmental period during which midge resistance was studied

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL CONDITIONS
entities.description: External factors that affect insect development and the chemical composition of sorghum grain
